description_long: This is a classic submachine gun with a robust, dark metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture including the stock, pistol grip, and foregrip. The rifle features a prominent detachable box magazine inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The stock is fixed and made of polished wood, providing stability and a traditional aesthetic. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel for aiming. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details, and the finish is a mix of glossy metal and varnished wood. The rifle's proportions and construction suggest it is designed for durability and reliable use in urban environments.
description: A classic submachine gun with a dark metal body, wooden stock, and a vertical box magazine. Features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, iron front sight, and the vertical magazine extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, pistol grip, foregrip, and the box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock, rear iron sight, and the alignment of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and the wooden components in profile.
